tasks.name: remove-duplicates-agent
tasks.task:
source_report: ~/docs/knowledge-review-agent.md
knowledge_dir: knowledge/agent

Read the Duplicate Candidates section of source_report. If there are no candidates, stop — nothing to do.

For each duplicate pair: read both files and confirm the overlap is significant. Delete the less comprehensive file with `rm`. Always retain the more complete and specific entry. Never delete both files of a pair.

tasks.name: remove-duplicates-commit
tasks.task: Run `git status` to see what was deleted. Stage all changes in knowledge/ with `git add knowledge/` and commit with a conventional commit message (e.g. `chore(knowledge): remove duplicate entries per audit`). If there is nothing to commit, stop.
